text:
Thanks for the question. The market settled correctly—Warriors won by 1 in OT, so your Lakers position closed as a loss.

The 4-hour delay between the final whistle and settlement isn't unusual. We wait for official data-feed confirmation and any league reviews (protests, scoring corrections, etc.) before grading a market. In this case, there may have been a review, or it may have just been the standard confirmation window. A human will follow up with the specific reason for the timing on your market.

Novig Support
